scope: Cycle 20: Bug hunt C19 (BUG-031 story_log pipeline) + feat JourneyMapDisplay CRT visual polish

bugs_found.description: _build_run_summary() only passed 5 fields (biome, card_index, life, currency, merlin_found) — missing story_log, oghams_used, minigames_won, minigames_played, faction_rep_delta. EndRunScreen showed zeros for all stats and JourneyMapDisplay always displayed empty state. Fixed by reading full run state from MerlinStore + story_log from WalkEventController.get_story_log().

overall_assessment: Bug hunt C19: verified EndRunScreen auto-wiring (correct), GFC signal chain (correct), found 1 MEDIUM data pipeline bug. Feature: JourneyMapDisplay fully CRT-styled. 30 total bugs fixed across 20 cycles.
